settings.zoom-desc: Master scale for cards and previews
settings.crop-top-desc: Hide pixels from the top of each workspace preview
settings.crop-bottom-desc: Hide pixels from the bottom of each workspace preview
settings.crop-left-desc: Hide pixels from the left of each workspace preview
settings.crop-right-desc: Hide pixels from the right of each workspace preview
settings.max-titles-desc: How many window titles to list under each workspace (0 hides the list)
settings.rounded-corners-desc: Round the mini-monitor preview corners. Disable for sharper edges and better performance with many workspaces.
settings.show-workspace-name-desc: Display the workspace name above each preview. When hidden, the top gap matches the side gaps.
settings.card-inner-gap-desc: Padding (in pixels) between the workspace preview and the card edges.
